name: misconception-detector
description: AI-powered misconception diagnosis for students and teachers

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:netlify: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix frontend && npx esbuild backend/src/api.ts --bundle --platform=node --outdir=netlify/functions
